title: Add team identity and team-level strategy priors
summary: Pit calls are made by teams, not drivers.
rationale: Pit calls are made by teams, not drivers. FastF1 session results expose team names, and official F1 pit-stop coverage notes that teams optimize and guard their own pit-loss and stop-execution characteristics, which driver code alone does not represent well.
implementation_hint: Externally map Driver/Race/Year to TeamName, then create leakage-safe cross-fit priors such as team x compound pit rate, team x caution-stop tendency, team x race first-stop timing, and team x wet-race aggressiveness.
expected_effect: Should capture persistent strategic style and operational aggressiveness that frequency-encoded Driver cannot fully absorb.
risk: Reserve drivers, team changes across years, and small-sample team-race priors can overfit unless cross-fit strictly within folds.
